leadText: Gooey (Japanese: ぬめぬめ Gooey) is an Ability introduced in Generation VI. Prior to Generation IX, it was the signature Ability of Goomy's evolutionary line.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokémon with this Ability is hit by a move that makes contact , the Speed of the attacking Pokémon is decreased by one stage. If a Pokémon with this Ability is hit by a multistrike move that makes contact (such as Fury Swipes ), each hit activates this Ability. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Gooey has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
